prompt: Retrieve title TTL-6349 and confirm its name, current location, and status. Do not change it or contact anyone yet. In the final recap, give the record ID first, original location second, and corrected location third.

follow_up_turns.content: Move that same title to Reference Desk. Do not change its hold-until date or status, and do not notify anyone.
Correction: the new location should be Local History Room, not Reference Desk. Keep every other field as it is.

stages.purpose: Retrieve the explicitly identified target before any mutation.
Change only the target's location to the first requested value.
Correct the location on the same target without changing its hold-until date or status.

response_constraints: Keep both location changes tied to the record retrieved by the explicit ID.
Do not claim a retrieval or update succeeded unless the corresponding tool result confirms it.
State that the first location was superseded and report the corrected location.
The final recap must present these items in order: record ID; original location; corrected location.
